section.heading: Interstate collaboration

content.p: The Secretary shall permit the establishment of voluntary pooling arrangements among States, and regional fund-sharing agreements, to carry out projects receiving assistance under this subchapter.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 87–128, title III, § 381J, as added Pub. L. 104–127, title VII, § 761, Apr. 4, 1996, 110 Stat. 1146.)
